data.content: Added guarded nextKnot transitions in terminal-manager to always pass expectedState and treat expected-state mismatches as stale races (refresh-and-continue) instead of hard failures; added regression test terminal-manager-knots-next-guard.test.ts. Quality gates: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Pushed d0aae735c09ec9f36f3193a5962a3157b3dcf7eb to origin/main.
